texto: Our culture has at its core the idea that more is better. Many of us design our lives around this belief. And yet the underlying qualities that truly affect happiness are not advanced one whit by having more material things. More peace of mind is gained by allowing ourselves to be satisfied with what we already have. More joy is not bought
autor: it is found in our hearts.
explicacao: Citação de it is found in our hearts. sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Our culture has at its core the idea that more is better. Many of us design our lives around this…” articula reflexao, karen-ramsey, culture em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
